zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybil de Montgomery於1066年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉格曼-德-素次時，她的父親Roger de Montgomery44歲，母親Mabel Talvas41歲。她於大約1083年與Robert Fitz Hamon結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1107年3月10日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特享年41歲，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪艾法圖維爾-格雷斯當。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybil de Montgomery was born in 1066, in Saint-Germain-des-Essourts, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, her father, Roger de Montgomery, was 44 and her mother, Mabel Talvas, was 41. She married Robert Fitz Hamon about 1083. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. She died about 10 March 1107, in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybil de Montgomery est née en 1066, à Saint-Germain-des-Essourts, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Roger de Montgomery, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Mabel Talvas, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Fitz Hamon environ 1083. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Elle est décédée environ 10 mars 1107, à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sybil de Montgomery 1066 in Saint-Germain-des-Essourts, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Montgomery 44 und ihre Mutter Mabel Talvas 41. Sie hat um 1083 Robert Fitz Hamon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter. Sie starb um 10. März 1107 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil de Montgomery è nata il nel 1066 nel Saint-Germain-des-Essourts, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Roger de Montgomery, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Mabel Talvas, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Robert Fitz Hamon circa 1083. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie. Morì circa 10 marzo 1107, nel Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybil de Montgomeryが1066年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメサイント-ジャーメイン-デス-エソウルツで生まれた時，父Roger de Montgomeryは44歳，母Mabel Talvasは41歳であった。約1083年にRobert Fitz Hamonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1107年3月10日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターで41歳で死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアファトウヴィレ-グレスティインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybil de Montgomery(이)가 1066년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 세인트-그맹-데스-소우르츠에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Montgomery(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabel Talvas(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 대략 1083년 Robert Fitz Hamon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1107년 3월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 팻우비레-그레스테인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil de Montgomery nasceu em 1066, em Saint-Germain-des-Essourts, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Roger de Montgomery, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Mabel Talvas, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Fitz Hamon aproximadamente 1083. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 10 de março de 1107, em Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybil de Montgomery родилась в 1066 г. в местности сеинт-гирмеин-дес-ессоурц, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Roger de Montgomery было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Mabel Talvas, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Fitz Hamon около 1083 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Она умерла около 10 марта 1107 г. в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности фатоувилле-грестеин, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sybil de Montgomery nació en 1066, en Saint-Germain-des-Essourts, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Roger de Montgomery, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Mabel Talvas, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Robert Fitz Hamon aproximadamente 1083. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 10 de marzo de 1107, en Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
